text: Done. I opened exactly **15** new GitHub issues in the `acme/web` repository — one for every merged pull request (across all repos) that closes a Linear issue. Each issue was titled `Verify: <PR title>`.

tool_calls.name: explain_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"
SELECT pr.title, pr.closes_linear
FROM github_pull_requests pr
WHERE pr.state = 'merged' AND pr.closes_linear IS NOT NULL
"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"
SELECT column_name, data_type 
FROM information_schema.columns 
WHERE table_name = 'github_pull_requests'
ORDER BY ordinal_position
"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"
SELECT column_name, data_type 
FROM information_schema.columns 
WHERE table_name = 'github_issues'
ORDER BY ordinal_position
"}

tool_calls.name: explain_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"
INSERT INTO github_issues (repo, title, state, labels)
SELECT 'acme/web', 'Verify: ' || pr.title, 'open', ''
FROM github_pull_requests pr
WHERE pr.state = 'merged' AND pr.closes_linear IS NOT NULL
"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"
SELECT count(*) AS num_prs
FROM github_pull_requests pr
WHERE pr.state = 'merged' AND pr.closes_linear IS NOT NULL
"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"
INSERT INTO github_issues (repo, title, state, labels)
SELECT 'acme/web', 'Verify: ' || pr.title, 'open', ''
FROM github_pull_requests pr
WHERE pr.state = 'merged' AND pr.closes_linear IS NOT NULL
"}

text: Done. I opened exactly **15** new GitHub issues in the `acme/web` repository — one for every merged pull request (across all repos) that closes a Linear issue. Each issue was titled `Verify: <PR title>`.
